from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-training.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-training"
    akv_name = "pins-kv-peas-training"
    secret_name = "peas-sql-app-connection-string"

elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-dev.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-dev"
    akv_name = "pinskvsynwodwdevuks"
    secret_name = "mpesc-sql-password"

else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

BASE_PATH = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"

INSPECTOR_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Inspector.csv"
CASES_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"
OUT_PATH = f"{BASE_PATH}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Inspector/inspector_for_load"

url = (
    f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;"
    f"database={database};"
    "encrypt=true;"
    "trustServerCertificate=false;"
    "hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;"
    "loginTimeout=30;"
)

secret_value = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(akv_name, secret_name)

if secret_name == "peas-sql-app-connection-string":
    parts = {
        kv.split("=", 1)[0].strip().lower(): kv.split("=", 1)[1].strip()
        for kv in secret_value.split(";")
        if "=" in kv
    }
    sql_user = parts.get("user id") or parts.get("uid") or parts.get("user")
    sql_password = parts.get("password") or parts.get("pwd")

    if not sql_user:
        raise ValueError(f"User ID not found in {secret_name} (KV={akv_name})")
    if not sql_password:
        raise ValueError(f"Password not found in {secret_name} (KV={akv_name})")
else:
    sql_user = "peas_app_ZXzkE0vP"
    sql_password = secret_value

def clean_key(col):
    return F.trim(F.regexp_replace(col.cast("string"), r"\.0$", ""))

inspector_df = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(INSPECTOR_PATH)
)

cases_df = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASES_PATH)
    .select(
        clean_key(F.col("Case ID")).alias("caseNodeId"),
        F.trim(F.col("GUID").cast("string")).alias("caseId")
    )
    .filter(F.col("caseNodeId").isNotNull() & (F.col("caseNodeId") != ""))
    .filter(F.col("caseId").isNotNull() & (F.col("caseId") != ""))
    .dropDuplicates(["caseNodeId"])
)

existing_users = (
    spark.read.format("jdbc")
    .option("url", url)
    .option("query", """
        SELECT
            CAST(id AS varchar(36)) AS userId,
            CAST(legacyId AS varchar(255)) AS legacyId
        FROM dbo.[User]
        WHERE legacyId IS NOT NULL
    """)
    .option("user", sql_user)
    .option("password", sql_password)
    .load()
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("userId")).alias("userId"),
        clean_key(F.col("legacyId")).alias("legacyId")
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyId").isNotNull() & (F.col("legacyId") != ""))
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyId"])
)

display(inspector_df.select("TypeOfInvolvement").distinct())

inspector_clean = (
    inspector_df
    .filter(F.lower(F.trim(F.col("TypeOfInvolvement"))).contains("inspector"))
    .select(
        clean_key(F.col("CaseNodeId")).alias("caseNodeId"),
        clean_key(F.col("ContactID")).alias("legacyId")
    )
    .filter(F.col("caseNodeId").isNotNull() & (F.col("caseNodeId") != ""))
    .filter(F.col("legacyId").isNotNull() & (F.col("legacyId") != ""))
    .dropDuplicates(["caseNodeId", "legacyId"])
)

inspector_with_user = (
    inspector_clean.alias("i")
    .join(
        existing_users.alias("u"),
        F.col("i.legacyId") == F.col("u.legacyId"),
        "inner"
    )
    .join(
        cases_df.alias("c"),
        F.col("i.caseNodeId") == F.col("c.caseNodeId"),
        "inner"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("u.userId").alias("inspectorId"),
        F.current_timestamp().alias("inspectorAllocatedDate"),
        F.col("c.caseId").alias("caseId"),
        F.col("i.legacyId").alias("legacyId")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["inspectorId", "caseId", "legacyId"])
)

inspector_for_load = (
    inspector_with_user
    .select(
        "inspectorId",
        "inspectorAllocatedDate",
        "caseId"
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["inspectorId", "caseId"])
)

display(inspector_with_user.limit(50))
display(inspector_for_load.limit(50))

print("workspace:", workspace)
print("server:", server)
print("database:", database)
print("inspector_clean rows:", inspector_clean.count())
print("inspector_with_user rows:", inspector_with_user.count())
print("inspector_for_load rows:", inspector_for_load.count())
print("distinct caseId:", inspector_for_load.select("caseId").distinct().count())
print("distinct inspectorId:", inspector_for_load.select("inspectorId").distinct().count())

(
    inspector_for_load
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_PATH)
)

print("Wrote inspector load file to:", OUT_PATH)
print("Rows written:", inspector_for_load.count())
